        GHOST Memory Recording and Files Requirements

        UID:
        GHOST-MEMORY-RECORDING-FILES

        0.1

        SECTION
        		1
        1. Purpose and Scope
        TEXT
        This document defines durable MemoryRecord creation, memory-history persistence, editable metadata, SQLite mirroring, file lifecycle operations, and ChatGPT shared-link import.
        REQUIREMENT
        		1.1
        GHOST-MEM-REC-ROOT
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-SRS-FILE-TREE Requirement File Tree Parent Anchor
        Children:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-PRODUCT-NAME Product and Package Naming Boundary
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-MEMORY-PARENT Memory Management Parent
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-BOUNDARY Recording and File Boundary
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-CURRENT-COMPONENTS Current Recording Components
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-DURABLE-FIRST Durable Recording Priority
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-PATH-RECORD MemoryRecord Path
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-PATH-MANAGER MemoryManager Path
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-PATH-ACTIONS Capture Action Path
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-PATH-FILE-MANAGER File Manager Path
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-PATH-IMPORTERS Importer Paths
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-PATH-UI UI Wiring Paths
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-DATA-ROOT Memory Data Root
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-ID Record Identifier
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-INPUT Input Text
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-OUTPUT Output Text
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-SOURCE Source Field
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-TAG Record Tag
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-USER-KEYWORDS User Keywords
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-AUTO-KEYWORDS Automatic Keywords
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-PROJECT Active Project Snapshot Name
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-FILE-SNAPSHOT Embedded File Snapshot
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-SOURCE-MODE Retrieval Source Mode
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-DIRECT-KEY Direct Recall Key
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-ACTIVEBRIEF-TITLE ActiveBrief Title Field
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-ACTIVEBRIEF-BODY ActiveBrief Body Field
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-ACTIVEBRIEF-CONTRIBUTORS ActiveBrief Contributor Identifiers
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-LIST-NORMALIZATION List Normalization
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-EDITABLE-FIELDS Editable Metadata Fields
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-MANAGER-INIT MemoryManager Initialization
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-CAPTURE-ACTION Reusable Capture Action
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-RAGMEM-AUTHORITY .ragmem Stable Body Authority
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-META-AUTHORITY .ragmeta.json Metadata Authority

        • GHOST-MEM-REC-FILE-LOAD File Manager Load
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-FILE-RENAME-TITLE Rename Title Validation
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-FILE-DELETE-VALIDATE Delete History Validation
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-IMPORT-URL Shared URL Validation
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-IMPORT-TITLE Import Title Validation
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-IMPORT-PLAYWRIGHT Playwright Dependency
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-IMPORT-NAVIGATION Shared Page Navigation
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-IMPORT-EXTRACTION-ORDER Message Extraction Sources
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-IMPORT-STABILITY Message Stability Wait

        • GHOST-MEM-REC-IMPORT-PAIRING Imported Message Pairing
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-IMPORT-RAW-FALLBACK Raw Text Pair Fallback
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-IMPORT-NO-CONTENT No Importable Content
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-IMPORT-RECORDS Imported MemoryRecord Construction
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-IMPORT-BRIEF Optional Shared Memory Brief
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-IMPORT-PERSIST Imported History Persistence
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-IMPORT-REPORT Import Result Report

        • GHOST-MEM-REC-SESSION-STORE Session MemoryVectorStore Initialization

        • GHOST-MEM-REC-FILES-ACTIONS Files Page Actions
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-WIDGET-CLEAR Memory Widget State Reset

        • GHOST-MEM-REC-PATH-SANITATION Filename Path Sanitization
