        GHOST-MEM-REC-ROOT
        Memory Recording and Files Scope
        GHOST shall record accepted input/output pairs as MemoryRecords, maintain one active memory history, persist stable bodies and current metadata through separate files, mirror metadata into SQLite, and provide controlled history-file operations.
        REQUIREMENT
        		1.2
        GHOST-MEM-REC-PRODUCT-NAME
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-ROOT Memory Recording and Files Scope
        GHOST-MEM-REC-PRODUCT-NAME
        Product and Package Naming Boundary
        The product described by this document shall be named GHOST; current Python implementation paths may remain under ragstream.
        REQUIREMENT
        		1.3
        GHOST-MEM-REC-MEMORY-PARENT
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-ROOT Memory Recording and Files Scope
        GHOST-MEM-REC-MEMORY-PARENT
        Memory Management Parent
        Memory Recording and Files shall be governed by the authority model, capability boundaries, configuration governance, and sibling ownership defined in 50_memory_management.sdoc.
        REQUIREMENT
        		1.4
        GHOST-MEM-REC-BOUNDARY
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-ROOT Memory Recording and Files Scope
        GHOST-MEM-REC-BOUNDARY
        Recording and File Boundary
        This document shall own MemoryRecord structure, active-history state, capture actions, .ragmem persistence, .ragmeta.json persistence, SQLite metadata mirroring, history create/load/rename/delete operations, and current ChatGPT shared-link import.

        It shall not own semantic retrieval scoring, runtime compression, final Memory Context synthesis, or document Knowledge Management.
        REQUIREMENT
        		1.5
        GHOST-MEM-REC-CURRENT-COMPONENTS
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-ROOT Memory Recording and Files Scope
        GHOST-MEM-REC-CURRENT-COMPONENTS
        Current Recording Components
        The current capability shall be organized around MemoryRecord, MemoryManager, capture_memory_pair, MemoryFileManager, the ChatGPT shared-link importer, Streamlit file actions, and session initialization.
        REQUIREMENT
        		1.6
        GHOST-MEM-REC-DURABLE-FIRST
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-ROOT Memory Recording and Files Scope
        GHOST-MEM-REC-DURABLE-FIRST
        Durable Recording Priority
        Durable MemoryRecord creation shall complete before optional derivative vector ingestion is scheduled.
        SECTION
        		2
        2. Implementation and Data Location Map
        TEXT
        The memory recording capability spans core models, storage operations, importers, GUI actions, and the data/memory hierarchy.
        REQUIREMENT
        		2.1
        GHOST-MEM-REC-PATH-RECORD
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-ROOT Memory Recording and Files Scope
        GHOST-MEM-REC-PATH-RECORD
        MemoryRecord Path
        MemoryRecord implementation shall be traceable to ragstream/memory/memory_record.py.
        REQUIREMENT
        		2.2
        GHOST-MEM-REC-PATH-MANAGER
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-ROOT Memory Recording and Files Scope
        GHOST-MEM-REC-PATH-MANAGER
        MemoryManager Path
        Active history, persistence, and SQLite synchronization shall be traceable to ragstream/memory/memory_manager.py.
        REQUIREMENT
        		2.3
        GHOST-MEM-REC-PATH-ACTIONS
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-ROOT Memory Recording and Files Scope
        GHOST-MEM-REC-PATH-ACTIONS
        Capture Action Path
        Reusable pair-capture workflow shall be traceable to ragstream/memory/memory_actions.py.
        REQUIREMENT
        		2.4
        GHOST-MEM-REC-PATH-FILE-MANAGER
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-ROOT Memory Recording and Files Scope
        GHOST-MEM-REC-PATH-FILE-MANAGER
        File Manager Path
        History-level create, load, rename, and delete operations shall be traceable to ragstream/memory/storage/memory_file_manager.py.
        REQUIREMENT
        		2.5
        GHOST-MEM-REC-PATH-IMPORTERS
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-ROOT Memory Recording and Files Scope
        GHOST-MEM-REC-PATH-IMPORTERS
        Importer Paths
        Current ChatGPT import behavior shall be traceable to ragstream/memory/importers/chatgpt_shared_link_importer.py and chatgpt_shared_link_importer_helpers.py.
        REQUIREMENT
        		2.6
        GHOST-MEM-REC-PATH-UI
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-ROOT Memory Recording and Files Scope
        GHOST-MEM-REC-PATH-UI
        UI Wiring Paths
        Current manual-feed and file-action wiring shall be traceable to ragstream/app/ui_actions.py, ragstream/app/ui_actions_files.py, and ragstream/app/ui_streamlit.py.
        REQUIREMENT
        		2.7
        GHOST-MEM-REC-DATA-ROOT
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-ROOT Memory Recording and Files Scope
        Children:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-FILES-ROOT Memory Files Directory
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-SQLITE-PATH Memory SQLite Path
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-VECTOR-BOUNDARY Vector Directory Boundary
        GHOST-MEM-REC-DATA-ROOT
        Memory Data Root
        Current runtime memory data shall be rooted at data/memory/.
        REQUIREMENT
        		2.8
        GHOST-MEM-REC-FILES-ROOT
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-DATA-ROOT Memory Data Root
        GHOST-MEM-REC-FILES-ROOT
        Memory Files Directory
        Memory history body and metadata files shall be stored under data/memory/files/.
        REQUIREMENT
        		2.9
        GHOST-MEM-REC-SQLITE-PATH
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-DATA-ROOT Memory Data Root
        GHOST-MEM-REC-SQLITE-PATH
        Memory SQLite Path
        The current metadata index shall be stored at data/memory/memory_index.sqlite3.
        REQUIREMENT
        		2.10
        GHOST-MEM-REC-VECTOR-BOUNDARY
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-DATA-ROOT Memory Data Root
        GHOST-MEM-REC-VECTOR-BOUNDARY
        Vector Directory Boundary
        data/memory/vector_db/ shall be owned by Memory Ingestion and Retrieval requirements rather than by durable file truth.
        SECTION
        		3
        3. MemoryRecord Identity and Field Model
        TEXT
        One MemoryRecord represents one accepted input/output memory unit and carries stable body plus current metadata in RAM.
        REQUIREMENT
        		3.1
        GHOST-MEM-REC-ID
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-ROOT Memory Recording and Files Scope
        Children:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-PARENT-ID Parent Identifier
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-CREATED-UTC Creation Timestamp
        GHOST-MEM-REC-ID
        Record Identifier
        Each new MemoryRecord shall receive a record_id; the current generated form shall be a UUID hexadecimal string when no record_id is supplied.
        REQUIREMENT
        		3.2
        GHOST-MEM-REC-PARENT-ID
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-ID Record Identifier
        GHOST-MEM-REC-PARENT-ID
        Parent Identifier
        MemoryRecord shall support an optional parent_id without using parent_id as the record identity.
        REQUIREMENT
        		3.3
        GHOST-MEM-REC-CREATED-UTC
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-ID Record Identifier
        GHOST-MEM-REC-CREATED-UTC
        Creation Timestamp
        MemoryRecord shall store created_at_utc in UTC ISO-8601 form with a Z suffix when generated by the current implementation.
        REQUIREMENT
        		3.4
        GHOST-MEM-REC-INPUT
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-ROOT Memory Recording and Files Scope
        Children:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-INPUT-HASH Input Hash
        GHOST-MEM-REC-INPUT
        Input Text
        MemoryRecord shall preserve the accepted input_text as stable body content.
        REQUIREMENT
        		3.5
        GHOST-MEM-REC-OUTPUT
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-ROOT Memory Recording and Files Scope
        Children:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-OUTPUT-HASH Output Hash
        GHOST-MEM-REC-OUTPUT
        Output Text
        MemoryRecord shall preserve the accepted output_text as stable body content.
        REQUIREMENT
        		3.6
        GHOST-MEM-REC-SOURCE
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-ROOT Memory Recording and Files Scope
        GHOST-MEM-REC-SOURCE
        Source Field
        MemoryRecord shall preserve a source string identifying the capture or import origin.
        REQUIREMENT
        		3.7
        GHOST-MEM-REC-INPUT-HASH
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-INPUT Input Text
        GHOST-MEM-REC-INPUT-HASH
        Input Hash
        MemoryRecord shall store SHA-256 of input_text unless a persisted input_hash is supplied during loading.
        REQUIREMENT
        		3.8
        GHOST-MEM-REC-OUTPUT-HASH
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-OUTPUT Output Text
        GHOST-MEM-REC-OUTPUT-HASH
        Output Hash
        MemoryRecord shall store SHA-256 of output_text unless a persisted output_hash is supplied during loading.
        REQUIREMENT
        		3.9
        GHOST-MEM-REC-TAG
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-ROOT Memory Recording and Files Scope
        Children:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-TAG-CATALOG Current Tag Catalog
        GHOST-MEM-REC-TAG
        Record Tag
        MemoryRecord shall carry a current tag whose capture default is Green.
        REQUIREMENT
        		3.10
        GHOST-MEM-REC-TAG-CATALOG
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-TAG Record Tag
        GHOST-MEM-REC-TAG-CATALOG
        Current Tag Catalog
        MemoryManager shall expose the current tag catalog Gold, Green, and Black.
        REQUIREMENT
        		3.11
        GHOST-MEM-REC-USER-KEYWORDS
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-ROOT Memory Recording and Files Scope
        GHOST-MEM-REC-USER-KEYWORDS
        User Keywords
        MemoryRecord shall store an ordered case-insensitively deduplicated list of non-empty user_keywords.
        REQUIREMENT
        		3.12
        GHOST-MEM-REC-AUTO-KEYWORDS
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-ROOT Memory Recording and Files Scope
        Children:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-YAKE Current Automatic Keyword Generator
        GHOST-MEM-REC-AUTO-KEYWORDS
        Automatic Keywords
        MemoryRecord shall store automatic keywords generated from combined input/output text or loaded from persisted data.
        REQUIREMENT
        		3.13
        GHOST-MEM-REC-PROJECT
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-ROOT Memory Recording and Files Scope
        GHOST-MEM-REC-PROJECT
        Active Project Snapshot Name
        MemoryRecord shall support active_project_name as current metadata describing the project active during capture or import.
        REQUIREMENT
        		3.14
        GHOST-MEM-REC-FILE-SNAPSHOT
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-ROOT Memory Recording and Files Scope
        GHOST-MEM-REC-FILE-SNAPSHOT
        Embedded File Snapshot
        MemoryRecord shall support embedded_files_snapshot as an ordered list captured with the interaction.
        REQUIREMENT
        		3.15
        GHOST-MEM-REC-SOURCE-MODE
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-ROOT Memory Recording and Files Scope
        GHOST-MEM-REC-SOURCE-MODE
        Retrieval Source Mode
        MemoryRecord shall support retrieval_source_mode values QA, Q, or A; invalid or absent values shall normalize to QA.
        REQUIREMENT
        		3.16
        GHOST-MEM-REC-DIRECT-KEY
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-ROOT Memory Recording and Files Scope
        GHOST-MEM-REC-DIRECT-KEY
        Direct Recall Key
        MemoryRecord shall support a trimmed direct_recall_key string whose capture default is empty.
        REQUIREMENT
        		3.17
        GHOST-MEM-REC-ACTIVEBRIEF-TITLE
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-ROOT Memory Recording and Files Scope
        GHOST-MEM-REC-ACTIVEBRIEF-TITLE
        ActiveBrief Title Field
        MemoryRecord shall support active_retrieval_brief_title as stable body content.
        REQUIREMENT
        		3.18
        GHOST-MEM-REC-ACTIVEBRIEF-BODY
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-ROOT Memory Recording and Files Scope
        GHOST-MEM-REC-ACTIVEBRIEF-BODY
        ActiveBrief Body Field
        MemoryRecord shall support active_retrieval_brief as stable body content.
        REQUIREMENT
        		3.19
        GHOST-MEM-REC-ACTIVEBRIEF-CONTRIBUTORS
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-ROOT Memory Recording and Files Scope
        GHOST-MEM-REC-ACTIVEBRIEF-CONTRIBUTORS
        ActiveBrief Contributor Identifiers
        MemoryRecord shall support an ordered deduplicated active_retrieval_brief_contributor_ids list as stable body content.
        REQUIREMENT
        		3.20
        GHOST-MEM-REC-LIST-NORMALIZATION
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-ROOT Memory Recording and Files Scope
        GHOST-MEM-REC-LIST-NORMALIZATION
        List Normalization
        MemoryRecord list normalization shall trim values, remove empty values, and remove case-insensitive duplicates while preserving first occurrence order.
        SECTION
        		4
        4. Automatic Keywords and Editable Metadata
        TEXT
        Automatic keywords are derivative metadata; user-facing edits modify metadata rather than stable Q/A body.
        REQUIREMENT
        		4.1
        GHOST-MEM-REC-YAKE
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-AUTO-KEYWORDS Automatic Keywords
        Children:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-YAKE-BASELINE Current YAKE Baseline
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-YAKE-UNAVAILABLE YAKE Unavailable Behavior
        GHOST-MEM-REC-YAKE
        Current Automatic Keyword Generator
        The current automatic keyword generator shall attempt YAKE extraction over input_text and output_text combined.
        REQUIREMENT
        		4.2
        GHOST-MEM-REC-YAKE-BASELINE
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-YAKE Current Automatic Keyword Generator
        GHOST-MEM-REC-YAKE-BASELINE
        Current YAKE Baseline
        The current YAKE call shall use English, maximum n-gram length 3, deduplication limit 0.9, and top 5 results.
        REQUIREMENT
        		4.3
        GHOST-MEM-REC-YAKE-UNAVAILABLE
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-YAKE Current Automatic Keyword Generator
        GHOST-MEM-REC-YAKE-UNAVAILABLE
        YAKE Unavailable Behavior
        If YAKE cannot be imported or keyword extraction fails, automatic keyword generation shall return an empty list without preventing MemoryRecord creation.
        REQUIREMENT
        		4.4
        GHOST-MEM-REC-EDITABLE-FIELDS
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-ROOT Memory Recording and Files Scope
        Children:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-METADATA-UPDATE Editable Metadata Update
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-GUI-TAG-VALIDATION GUI Tag Validation
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-GUI-KEYWORDS-TYPE GUI Keyword Type Handling
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-GUI-SOURCE-MODE GUI Source Mode Normalization
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-GUI-DIRECT-KEY GUI Direct Key Normalization
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-GUI-CHANGE-DETECTION Metadata Change Detection
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-NO-AUTO-REINGEST-EDIT No Current Automatic Vector Re-Ingestion after Edit
        GHOST-MEM-REC-EDITABLE-FIELDS
        Editable Metadata Fields
        Current editable per-record metadata shall include tag, user_keywords, retrieval_source_mode, and direct_recall_key.
        REQUIREMENT
        		4.5
        GHOST-MEM-REC-METADATA-UPDATE
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-EDITABLE-FIELDS Editable Metadata Fields
        GHOST-MEM-REC-METADATA-UPDATE
        Editable Metadata Update
        Updating editable metadata shall not change record_id, stable Q/A text, hashes, source, creation timestamp, or persisted ActiveBrief body fields.
        REQUIREMENT
        		4.6
        GHOST-MEM-REC-GUI-TAG-VALIDATION
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-EDITABLE-FIELDS Editable Metadata Fields
        GHOST-MEM-REC-GUI-TAG-VALIDATION
        GUI Tag Validation
        MemoryManager.sync_gui_edits shall accept a tag update only when the value belongs to the current tag catalog.
        REQUIREMENT
        		4.7
        GHOST-MEM-REC-GUI-KEYWORDS-TYPE
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-EDITABLE-FIELDS Editable Metadata Fields
        GHOST-MEM-REC-GUI-KEYWORDS-TYPE
        GUI Keyword Type Handling
        A non-list user_keywords value supplied to MemoryManager.sync_gui_edits shall normalize to an empty list.
        REQUIREMENT
        		4.8
        GHOST-MEM-REC-GUI-SOURCE-MODE
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-EDITABLE-FIELDS Editable Metadata Fields
        GHOST-MEM-REC-GUI-SOURCE-MODE
        GUI Source Mode Normalization
        GUI retrieval_source_mode shall normalize to QA, Q, or A, with invalid non-null values becoming QA.
        REQUIREMENT
        		4.9
        GHOST-MEM-REC-GUI-DIRECT-KEY
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-EDITABLE-FIELDS Editable Metadata Fields
        GHOST-MEM-REC-GUI-DIRECT-KEY
        GUI Direct Key Normalization
        GUI direct_recall_key shall be converted to a trimmed string when supplied.
        REQUIREMENT
        		4.10
        GHOST-MEM-REC-GUI-CHANGE-DETECTION
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-EDITABLE-FIELDS Editable Metadata Fields
        GHOST-MEM-REC-GUI-CHANGE-DETECTION
        Metadata Change Detection
        MemoryManager shall compare before and after index views and shall rewrite metadata and refresh SQLite only when at least one matched record changes.
        REQUIREMENT
        		4.11
        GHOST-MEM-REC-NO-AUTO-REINGEST-EDIT
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-EDITABLE-FIELDS Editable Metadata Fields
        GHOST-MEM-REC-NO-AUTO-REINGEST-EDIT
        No Current Automatic Vector Re-Ingestion after Edit
        Changing editable metadata through sync_gui_edits shall not currently schedule memory-vector re-ingestion by itself.
        SECTION
        		5
        5. Active History Initialization and Capture Workflow
        TEXT
        MemoryManager owns one active history, its record list, file names, metadata, SQLite path, and RAM-only pending-topic state.
        REQUIREMENT
        		5.1
        GHOST-MEM-REC-MANAGER-INIT
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-ROOT Memory Recording and Files Scope
        Children:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-INIT-NO-FILE No Automatic History File without Title
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-INIT-ID Initial Manager Identifier
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-START-TITLE New History Title Validation
        GHOST-MEM-REC-MANAGER-INIT
        MemoryManager Initialization
        MemoryManager initialization shall create memory_root and files_root directories and initialize the SQLite schema.
        REQUIREMENT
        		5.2
        GHOST-MEM-REC-INIT-NO-FILE
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-MANAGER-INIT MemoryManager Initialization
        GHOST-MEM-REC-INIT-NO-FILE
        No Automatic History File without Title
        Constructing MemoryManager with an empty title shall not create a .ragmem or .ragmeta.json history file.
        REQUIREMENT
        		5.3
        GHOST-MEM-REC-INIT-ID
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-MANAGER-INIT MemoryManager Initialization
        GHOST-MEM-REC-INIT-ID
        Initial Manager Identifier
        MemoryManager shall hold a generated file_id even before an active history file is created.
        REQUIREMENT
        		5.4
        GHOST-MEM-REC-START-TITLE
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-MANAGER-INIT MemoryManager Initialization
        Children:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-START-RESET New History State Reset
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-FILENAME-PATTERN History Filename Pattern
        GHOST-MEM-REC-START-TITLE
        New History Title Validation
        start_new_history shall reject an empty title.
        REQUIREMENT
        		5.5
        GHOST-MEM-REC-START-RESET
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-START-TITLE New History Title Validation
        GHOST-MEM-REC-START-RESET
        New History State Reset
        start_new_history shall generate a new file_id and reset records, metainfo, pending_activebrief_topic_buffer, and b_file_created.
        REQUIREMENT
        		5.6
        GHOST-MEM-REC-FILENAME-PATTERN
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-START-TITLE New History Title Validation
        Children:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-SAFE-TITLE Filename Title Sanitization
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-FILENAME-COLLISION Filename Collision Handling
        GHOST-MEM-REC-FILENAME-PATTERN
        History Filename Pattern
        The current new-history filename stem shall combine local date/time to minute precision with a sanitized title.

        The paired filenames shall end in .ragmem and .ragmeta.json.
        REQUIREMENT
        		5.7
        GHOST-MEM-REC-SAFE-TITLE
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-FILENAME-PATTERN History Filename Pattern
        GHOST-MEM-REC-SAFE-TITLE
        Filename Title Sanitization
        Filename title sanitation shall replace non-alphanumeric/non-dot/non-underscore/non-hyphen sequences with hyphens, collapse repeated hyphens, strip boundary punctuation, and use Untitled when empty.
        REQUIREMENT
        		5.8
        GHOST-MEM-REC-FILENAME-COLLISION
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-FILENAME-PATTERN History Filename Pattern
        GHOST-MEM-REC-FILENAME-COLLISION
        Filename Collision Handling
        When the generated .ragmem filename already exists, the stem shall append the first eight characters of file_id before assigning paired filenames.
        REQUIREMENT
        		5.9
        GHOST-MEM-REC-CAPTURE-ACTION
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-ROOT Memory Recording and Files Scope
        Children:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-CAPTURE-INPUT Capture Input Validation
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-CAPTURE-OUTPUT Capture Output Validation
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-CAPTURE-SYNC-FIRST Synchronize Existing Edits Before Capture
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-CAPTURE-DEFAULTS Captured Record Defaults
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-AUTO-HISTORY Automatic History on First Capture
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-ACTIVEBRIEF-BEFORE-APPEND ActiveBrief Before Durable Append
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-CAPTURE-PERSIST-SEQUENCE Capture Persistence Sequence
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-CAPTURE-RETURN Capture Result
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-INGEST-SCHEDULE Optional Ingestion Scheduling
        GHOST-MEM-REC-CAPTURE-ACTION
        Reusable Capture Action
        capture_memory_pair shall provide the reusable workflow used by manual memory feed and other callers.
        REQUIREMENT
        		5.10
        GHOST-MEM-REC-CAPTURE-INPUT
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-CAPTURE-ACTION Reusable Capture Action
        GHOST-MEM-REC-CAPTURE-INPUT
        Capture Input Validation
        capture_memory_pair shall return unsuccessful status and create no record when input_text is empty after trimming.
        REQUIREMENT
        		5.11
        GHOST-MEM-REC-CAPTURE-OUTPUT
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-CAPTURE-ACTION Reusable Capture Action
        GHOST-MEM-REC-CAPTURE-OUTPUT
        Capture Output Validation
        capture_memory_pair shall return unsuccessful status and create no record when output_text is empty after trimming.
        REQUIREMENT
        		5.12
        GHOST-MEM-REC-CAPTURE-SYNC-FIRST
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-CAPTURE-ACTION Reusable Capture Action
        GHOST-MEM-REC-CAPTURE-SYNC-FIRST
        Synchronize Existing Edits Before Capture
        capture_memory_pair shall synchronize supplied GUI record edits before creating the new MemoryRecord.
        REQUIREMENT
        		5.13
        GHOST-MEM-REC-CAPTURE-DEFAULTS
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-CAPTURE-ACTION Reusable Capture Action
        GHOST-MEM-REC-CAPTURE-DEFAULTS
        Captured Record Defaults
        MemoryManager.capture_pair shall create the new record with tag Green, retrieval_source_mode QA, and empty direct_recall_key.
        REQUIREMENT
        		5.14
        GHOST-MEM-REC-AUTO-HISTORY
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-CAPTURE-ACTION Reusable Capture Action
        GHOST-MEM-REC-AUTO-HISTORY
        Automatic History on First Capture
        If no active title exists, the first capture shall start a history whose current automatic title is memory-record.
        REQUIREMENT
        		5.15
        GHOST-MEM-REC-ACTIVEBRIEF-BEFORE-APPEND
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-CAPTURE-ACTION Reusable Capture Action
        GHOST-MEM-REC-ACTIVEBRIEF-BEFORE-APPEND
        ActiveBrief Before Durable Append
        MemoryManager shall attempt ActiveRetrievalBrief creation before the new record is appended to .ragmem so the resulting brief fields can be included in the stable body.
        REQUIREMENT
        		5.16
        GHOST-MEM-REC-CAPTURE-PERSIST-SEQUENCE
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-CAPTURE-ACTION Reusable Capture Action
        Children:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-AC-CAPTURE AC: Durable Pair Capture
        GHOST-MEM-REC-CAPTURE-PERSIST-SEQUENCE
        Capture Persistence Sequence
        After ActiveBrief processing, MemoryManager shall append the record to its in-memory list, append one record block to .ragmem, rewrite .ragmeta.json, and refresh SQLite.
        REQUIREMENT
        		5.17
        GHOST-MEM-REC-CAPTURE-RETURN
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-CAPTURE-ACTION Reusable Capture Action
        GHOST-MEM-REC-CAPTURE-RETURN
        Capture Result
        A successful capture action shall return success, the MemoryRecord, record_id, file_id, and active .ragmem filename.
        REQUIREMENT
        		5.18
        GHOST-MEM-REC-INGEST-SCHEDULE
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-CAPTURE-ACTION Reusable Capture Action
        Children:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-INGEST-SCHEDULE-FAIL Ingestion Scheduling Failure
        GHOST-MEM-REC-INGEST-SCHEDULE
        Optional Ingestion Scheduling
        When a memory_ingestion_manager is supplied, capture_memory_pair shall attempt to schedule asynchronous ingestion after durable capture completes.
        REQUIREMENT
        		5.19
        GHOST-MEM-REC-INGEST-SCHEDULE-FAIL
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-INGEST-SCHEDULE Optional Ingestion Scheduling
        Children:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-AC-VECTOR-FAIL AC: Vector Failure Isolation
        GHOST-MEM-REC-INGEST-SCHEDULE-FAIL
        Ingestion Scheduling Failure
        If vector-ingestion scheduling raises an exception, the action shall retain the saved MemoryRecord and report a warning rather than undo durable capture.
        SECTION
        		6
        6. Stable .ragmem Body Persistence
        TEXT
        The .ragmem file is an append-oriented sequence of explicit JSON record blocks containing stable body fields.
        REQUIREMENT
        		6.1
        GHOST-MEM-REC-RAGMEM-AUTHORITY
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-ROOT Memory Recording and Files Scope
        Children:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-RAGMEM-MARKERS Record Block Markers
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-RAGMEM-JSON Record Block JSON
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-RAGMEM-FIELDS Stable Body Fields
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-RAGMEM-NO-EDITABLE Editable Metadata Exclusion
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-RAGMEM-APPEND Record Append Behavior
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-RAGMEM-READ Record Block Loading
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-RAGMEM-NO-VECTORS No Vector Data in .ragmem
        GHOST-MEM-REC-RAGMEM-AUTHORITY
        .ragmem Stable Body Authority
        The .ragmem file shall remain the authority for stable MemoryRecord body fields.
        REQUIREMENT
        		6.2
        GHOST-MEM-REC-RAGMEM-MARKERS
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-RAGMEM-AUTHORITY .ragmem Stable Body Authority
        GHOST-MEM-REC-RAGMEM-MARKERS
        Record Block Markers
        Each .ragmem record block shall be delimited by the exact current start and end markers defined by MemoryRecord.
        REQUIREMENT
        		6.3
        GHOST-MEM-REC-RAGMEM-JSON
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-RAGMEM-AUTHORITY .ragmem Stable Body Authority
        GHOST-MEM-REC-RAGMEM-JSON
        Record Block JSON
        The content between record markers shall be one UTF-8 JSON object serialized with ensure_ascii disabled and indentation.
        REQUIREMENT
        		6.4
        GHOST-MEM-REC-RAGMEM-FIELDS
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-RAGMEM-AUTHORITY .ragmem Stable Body Authority
        GHOST-MEM-REC-RAGMEM-FIELDS
        Stable Body Fields
        The current .ragmem body shall contain record_id, parent_id, created_at_utc, input_text, output_text, source, input_hash, output_hash, active_retrieval_brief_title, active_retrieval_brief, and active_retrieval_brief_contributor_ids.
        REQUIREMENT
        		6.5
        GHOST-MEM-REC-RAGMEM-NO-EDITABLE
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-RAGMEM-AUTHORITY .ragmem Stable Body Authority
        GHOST-MEM-REC-RAGMEM-NO-EDITABLE
        Editable Metadata Exclusion
        Current tag, retrieval_source_mode, direct_recall_key, automatic keywords, user keywords, active project name, and embedded-file snapshot shall not be duplicated into newly written body-only .ragmem blocks.
        REQUIREMENT
        		6.6
        GHOST-MEM-REC-RAGMEM-APPEND
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-RAGMEM-AUTHORITY .ragmem Stable Body Authority
        Children:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-RAGMEM-CREATED-FLAG File-Created Flag
        GHOST-MEM-REC-RAGMEM-APPEND
        Record Append Behavior
        Normal pair capture shall open the active .ragmem file in append mode, write one complete MemoryRecord block, and preserve existing blocks.
        REQUIREMENT
        		6.7
        GHOST-MEM-REC-RAGMEM-CREATED-FLAG
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-RAGMEM-APPEND Record Append Behavior
        GHOST-MEM-REC-RAGMEM-CREATED-FLAG
        File-Created Flag
        After a record block is appended, MemoryManager shall mark b_file_created true.
        REQUIREMENT
        		6.8
        GHOST-MEM-REC-RAGMEM-READ
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-RAGMEM-AUTHORITY .ragmem Stable Body Authority
        Children:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-RAGMEM-MALFORMED-BLOCK Malformed Block Handling
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-RAGMEM-BACKWARD Older Full-Block Compatibility
        GHOST-MEM-REC-RAGMEM-READ
        Record Block Loading
        Loading a history shall locate marker-delimited blocks, parse JSON objects, and construct MemoryRecords in file order.
        REQUIREMENT
        		6.9
        GHOST-MEM-REC-RAGMEM-MALFORMED-BLOCK
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-RAGMEM-READ Record Block Loading
        GHOST-MEM-REC-RAGMEM-MALFORMED-BLOCK
        Malformed Block Handling
        A marker-delimited block that cannot be parsed into a JSON object shall be skipped by the current loader without preventing other valid blocks from loading.
        REQUIREMENT
        		6.10
        GHOST-MEM-REC-RAGMEM-BACKWARD
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-RAGMEM-READ Record Block Loading
        GHOST-MEM-REC-RAGMEM-BACKWARD
        Older Full-Block Compatibility
        MemoryRecord.from_dict shall accept older .ragmem blocks that contain metadata in addition to stable body fields; current .ragmeta.json metadata shall be overlaid later when available.
        REQUIREMENT
        		6.11
        GHOST-MEM-REC-RAGMEM-NO-VECTORS
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-RAGMEM-AUTHORITY .ragmem Stable Body Authority
        GHOST-MEM-REC-RAGMEM-NO-VECTORS
        No Vector Data in .ragmem
        The .ragmem body shall not store embedding vectors, similarity scores, runtime candidates, compression output, or synthesized Memory Context.
        SECTION
        		7
        7. .ragmeta.json Metadata Persistence
        TEXT
        The paired .ragmeta.json file represents the current file-level summary and current per-record metadata view.
        REQUIREMENT
        		7.1
        GHOST-MEM-REC-META-AUTHORITY
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-ROOT Memory Recording and Files Scope
        Children:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-META-REBUILD Metadata Rebuild from Records
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-META-FILE-FIELDS File-Level Metadata Fields
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-META-RECORD-VIEW Per-Record Metadata View
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-META-OVERLAY Metadata Overlay on Load
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-META-MISSING Missing Metadata File
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-META-MALFORMED Malformed Metadata File
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-META-NO-RUNTIME Runtime Artifact Exclusion
        GHOST-MEM-REC-META-AUTHORITY
        .ragmeta.json Metadata Authority
        The paired .ragmeta.json file shall represent current editable/readable metadata for one memory history.
        REQUIREMENT
        		7.2
        GHOST-MEM-REC-META-REBUILD
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-META-AUTHORITY .ragmeta.json Metadata Authority
        GHOST-MEM-REC-META-REBUILD
        Metadata Rebuild from Records
        MemoryManager.save_metainfo shall rebuild metainfo from the current in-memory record list before writing the file.
        REQUIREMENT
        		7.3
        GHOST-MEM-REC-META-FILE-FIELDS
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-META-AUTHORITY .ragmeta.json Metadata Authority
        Children:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-META-CREATED Metadata Created Timestamp
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-META-UPDATED Metadata Updated Timestamp
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-META-AGGREGATES Metadata Aggregate Deduplication
        GHOST-MEM-REC-META-FILE-FIELDS
        File-Level Metadata Fields
        The current metadata file shall include file_id, title, paired filenames, created_at_utc, updated_at_utc, record_count, record_ids, parent_ids, tag_summary, aggregate automatic keywords, aggregate user keywords, and per-record metadata views.
        REQUIREMENT
        		7.4
        GHOST-MEM-REC-META-CREATED
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-META-FILE-FIELDS File-Level Metadata Fields
        GHOST-MEM-REC-META-CREATED
        Metadata Created Timestamp
        For a non-empty history, created_at_utc shall be taken from the first MemoryRecord; for an empty in-memory history built by MemoryManager it may be empty.
        REQUIREMENT
        		7.5
        GHOST-MEM-REC-META-UPDATED
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-META-FILE-FIELDS File-Level Metadata Fields
        GHOST-MEM-REC-META-UPDATED
        Metadata Updated Timestamp
        For a non-empty history, updated_at_utc shall be refreshed to current UTC when metainfo is rebuilt.
        REQUIREMENT
        		7.6
        GHOST-MEM-REC-META-AGGREGATES
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-META-FILE-FIELDS File-Level Metadata Fields
        GHOST-MEM-REC-META-AGGREGATES
        Metadata Aggregate Deduplication
        Aggregate parent identifiers and keyword lists shall be deduplicated while preserving first occurrence order.
        REQUIREMENT
        		7.7
        GHOST-MEM-REC-META-RECORD-VIEW
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-META-AUTHORITY .ragmeta.json Metadata Authority
        GHOST-MEM-REC-META-RECORD-VIEW
        Per-Record Metadata View
        Each per-record metadata entry shall use MemoryRecord.to_index_dict and shall not duplicate full input/output or full ActiveBrief text.
        REQUIREMENT
        		7.8
        GHOST-MEM-REC-META-OVERLAY
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-META-AUTHORITY .ragmeta.json Metadata Authority
        Children:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-META-NO-STABLE-OVERWRITE Stable Field Overlay Protection
        GHOST-MEM-REC-META-OVERLAY
        Metadata Overlay on Load
        When loading a history with an existing metadata file, MemoryManager shall apply metadata entries to matching record_id values after loading stable bodies from .ragmem.
        REQUIREMENT
        		7.9
        GHOST-MEM-REC-META-NO-STABLE-OVERWRITE
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-META-OVERLAY Metadata Overlay on Load
        Children:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-AC-AUTHORITY AC: Body and Metadata Authority
        GHOST-MEM-REC-META-NO-STABLE-OVERWRITE
        Stable Field Overlay Protection
        Metadata overlay shall not modify record_id, parent_id, created_at_utc, input/output text, source, hashes, or stable ActiveBrief fields.
        REQUIREMENT
        		7.10
        GHOST-MEM-REC-META-MISSING
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-META-AUTHORITY .ragmeta.json Metadata Authority
        GHOST-MEM-REC-META-MISSING
        Missing Metadata File
        When a history is loaded and its .ragmeta.json file is missing, MemoryManager shall rebuild and save metainfo from loaded records.
        REQUIREMENT
        		7.11
        GHOST-MEM-REC-META-MALFORMED
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-META-AUTHORITY .ragmeta.json Metadata Authority
        GHOST-MEM-REC-META-MALFORMED
        Malformed Metadata File
        Malformed .ragmeta.json input shall not be silently interpreted as valid metadata by MemoryManager.load_history; the JSON loading failure shall remain visible to the caller.
        REQUIREMENT
        		7.12
        GHOST-MEM-REC-META-NO-RUNTIME
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-META-AUTHORITY .ragmeta.json Metadata Authority
        Children:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-AC-NO-RUNTIME-PERSIST AC: Runtime Artifact Exclusion
        GHOST-MEM-REC-META-NO-RUNTIME
        Runtime Artifact Exclusion
        The metadata file shall not store raw vector hits, MemoryContextPack, compression results, synthesis diagnostics, or synthesized Memory Context.
        SECTION
        		8
        8. SQLite Metadata Mirror
        TEXT
        SQLite provides file listing and deterministic record lookup without becoming the full memory-body authority.
        REQUIREMENT
        		8.1
        GHOST-MEM-REC-SQLITE-SCHEMA
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-ROOT Memory Recording and Files Scope
        Children:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-SQLITE-FILE-PK Memory File Primary Key
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-SQLITE-RECORD-PK Memory Record Composite Key
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-SQLITE-FILE-COLUMNS File Table Columns
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-SQLITE-RECORD-COLUMNS Record Table Columns
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-SQLITE-NO-BODY No Full Q/A in SQLite
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-SQLITE-UPsert-FILE File Row Upsert
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-SQLITE-UPsert-RECORD Record Row Upsert
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-SQLITE-MIRROR-DELETE Mirror Row Cleanup
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-SQLITE-INDEX-TAG Tag Index
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-SQLITE-INDEX-PROJECT Project Index
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-SQLITE-INDEX-KEY Direct Recall Key Index
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-SQLITE-MIGRATION Current Column Migration
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-SQLITE-LIST History Listing Order
        GHOST-MEM-REC-SQLITE-SCHEMA
        SQLite Schema Initialization
        MemoryManager shall create memory_files and memory_records tables when absent.
        REQUIREMENT
        		8.2
        GHOST-MEM-REC-SQLITE-FILE-PK
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-SQLITE-SCHEMA SQLite Schema Initialization
        GHOST-MEM-REC-SQLITE-FILE-PK
        Memory File Primary Key
        memory_files.file_id shall be the table primary key.
        REQUIREMENT
        		8.3
        GHOST-MEM-REC-SQLITE-RECORD-PK
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-SQLITE-SCHEMA SQLite Schema Initialization
        GHOST-MEM-REC-SQLITE-RECORD-PK
        Memory Record Composite Key
        memory_records shall use the composite primary key file_id and record_id.
        REQUIREMENT
        		8.4
        GHOST-MEM-REC-SQLITE-FILE-COLUMNS
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-SQLITE-SCHEMA SQLite Schema Initialization
        GHOST-MEM-REC-SQLITE-FILE-COLUMNS
        File Table Columns
        memory_files shall store file_id, title, filename_ragmem, filename_meta, created_at_utc, updated_at_utc, and record_count.
        REQUIREMENT
        		8.5
        GHOST-MEM-REC-SQLITE-RECORD-COLUMNS
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-SQLITE-SCHEMA SQLite Schema Initialization
        GHOST-MEM-REC-SQLITE-RECORD-COLUMNS
        Record Table Columns
        memory_records shall store file_id, record_id, parent_id, created_at_utc, source, tag, retrieval_source_mode, direct_recall_key, keyword JSON, project/file snapshot JSON, and input/output hashes.
        REQUIREMENT
        		8.6
        GHOST-MEM-REC-SQLITE-NO-BODY
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-SQLITE-SCHEMA SQLite Schema Initialization
        GHOST-MEM-REC-SQLITE-NO-BODY
        No Full Q/A in SQLite
        memory_records shall not store full input_text, output_text, or full ActiveRetrievalBrief text.
        REQUIREMENT
        		8.7
        GHOST-MEM-REC-SQLITE-UPsert-FILE
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-SQLITE-SCHEMA SQLite Schema Initialization
        GHOST-MEM-REC-SQLITE-UPsert-FILE
        File Row Upsert
        refresh_sqlite_index shall insert or update the active memory_files row by file_id.
        REQUIREMENT
        		8.8
        GHOST-MEM-REC-SQLITE-UPsert-RECORD
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-SQLITE-SCHEMA SQLite Schema Initialization
        GHOST-MEM-REC-SQLITE-UPsert-RECORD
        Record Row Upsert
        refresh_sqlite_index shall insert or update every current MemoryRecord row by file_id and record_id.
        REQUIREMENT
        		8.9
        GHOST-MEM-REC-SQLITE-MIRROR-DELETE
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-SQLITE-SCHEMA SQLite Schema Initialization
        Children:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-SQLITE-EMPTY-CLEAN Empty Active Record Cleanup
        GHOST-MEM-REC-SQLITE-MIRROR-DELETE
        Mirror Row Cleanup
        After upserting the active record list, SQLite rows for the active file_id whose record_id is no longer present shall be deleted.
        REQUIREMENT
        		8.10
        GHOST-MEM-REC-SQLITE-EMPTY-CLEAN
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-SQLITE-MIRROR-DELETE Mirror Row Cleanup
        GHOST-MEM-REC-SQLITE-EMPTY-CLEAN
        Empty Active Record Cleanup
        When the active MemoryManager record list is empty, refresh shall delete all memory_records rows for the active file_id.
        REQUIREMENT
        		8.11
        GHOST-MEM-REC-SQLITE-INDEX-TAG
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-SQLITE-SCHEMA SQLite Schema Initialization
        GHOST-MEM-REC-SQLITE-INDEX-TAG
        Tag Index
        The current schema shall create an index on memory_records.tag.
        REQUIREMENT
        		8.12
        GHOST-MEM-REC-SQLITE-INDEX-PROJECT
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-SQLITE-SCHEMA SQLite Schema Initialization
        GHOST-MEM-REC-SQLITE-INDEX-PROJECT
        Project Index
        The current schema shall create an index on memory_records.active_project_name.
        REQUIREMENT
        		8.13
        GHOST-MEM-REC-SQLITE-INDEX-KEY
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-SQLITE-SCHEMA SQLite Schema Initialization
        GHOST-MEM-REC-SQLITE-INDEX-KEY
        Direct Recall Key Index
        The current schema shall create an index on memory_records.direct_recall_key.
        REQUIREMENT
        		8.14
        GHOST-MEM-REC-SQLITE-MIGRATION
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-SQLITE-SCHEMA SQLite Schema Initialization
        GHOST-MEM-REC-SQLITE-MIGRATION
        Current Column Migration
        Schema initialization shall add retrieval_source_mode and direct_recall_key columns with current defaults when loading an older memory_records table that lacks them.
        REQUIREMENT
        		8.15
        GHOST-MEM-REC-SQLITE-LIST
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-SQLITE-SCHEMA SQLite Schema Initialization
        GHOST-MEM-REC-SQLITE-LIST
        History Listing Order
        MemoryManager.list_histories shall return memory_files rows ordered by updated_at_utc descending.
        SECTION
        		9
        9. Loading, Closing, and Active State
        TEXT
        History loading reconstructs stable bodies, overlays current metadata, and re-synchronizes SQLite.
        REQUIREMENT
        		9.1
        GHOST-MEM-REC-LOAD-ID
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-ROOT Memory Recording and Files Scope
        Children:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-LOAD-FIELDS Loaded File-Level State
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-LOAD-RECORDS Loaded Record State
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-LOAD-PENDING-RESET Pending Buffer Reset on Load
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-LOAD-CREATED-FLAG Loaded File-Created Flag
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-LOAD-REFRESH SQLite Refresh after Load
        GHOST-MEM-REC-LOAD-ID
        History Lookup by file_id
        MemoryManager.load_history shall resolve the requested history through memory_files.file_id and shall fail when no matching row exists.
        REQUIREMENT
        		9.2
        GHOST-MEM-REC-LOAD-FIELDS
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-LOAD-ID History Lookup by file_id
        GHOST-MEM-REC-LOAD-FIELDS
        Loaded File-Level State
        Loading shall set file_id, title, filename_ragmem, and filename_meta from the SQLite file row.
        REQUIREMENT
        		9.3
        GHOST-MEM-REC-LOAD-RECORDS
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-LOAD-ID History Lookup by file_id
        GHOST-MEM-REC-LOAD-RECORDS
        Loaded Record State
        Loading shall replace the current record list with MemoryRecords read from the selected .ragmem file.
        REQUIREMENT
        		9.4
        GHOST-MEM-REC-LOAD-PENDING-RESET
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-LOAD-ID History Lookup by file_id
        GHOST-MEM-REC-LOAD-PENDING-RESET
        Pending Buffer Reset on Load
        Loading a history shall reset pending_activebrief_topic_buffer to empty.
        REQUIREMENT
        		9.5
        GHOST-MEM-REC-LOAD-CREATED-FLAG
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-LOAD-ID History Lookup by file_id
        GHOST-MEM-REC-LOAD-CREATED-FLAG
        Loaded File-Created Flag
        After load, b_file_created shall indicate whether the selected .ragmem path exists.
        REQUIREMENT
        		9.6
        GHOST-MEM-REC-LOAD-REFRESH
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-LOAD-ID History Lookup by file_id
        Children:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-AC-LOAD AC: History Load
        GHOST-MEM-REC-LOAD-REFRESH
        SQLite Refresh after Load
        After loading bodies and metadata, MemoryManager shall refresh the SQLite mirror for the active history.
        REQUIREMENT
        		9.7
        GHOST-MEM-REC-CLOSE
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-ROOT Memory Recording and Files Scope
        GHOST-MEM-REC-CLOSE
        MemoryManager Close
        MemoryManager.close shall save current metainfo and refresh the SQLite index.
        SECTION
        		10
        10. Memory History File Operations
        TEXT
        MemoryFileManager owns explicit file-level operations while delegating active record semantics to MemoryManager.
        REQUIREMENT
        		10.1
        GHOST-MEM-REC-FILE-LIST
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-ROOT Memory Recording and Files Scope
        GHOST-MEM-REC-FILE-LIST
        List Histories
        MemoryFileManager.list_histories shall return the MemoryManager SQLite history listing.
        REQUIREMENT
        		10.2
        GHOST-MEM-REC-FILE-CREATE-TITLE
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-ROOT Memory Recording and Files Scope
        Children:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-FILE-CREATE Create Empty History
        GHOST-MEM-REC-FILE-CREATE-TITLE
        Create History Title Validation
        MemoryFileManager.create_history shall reject an empty title.
        REQUIREMENT
        		10.3
        GHOST-MEM-REC-FILE-CREATE
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-FILE-CREATE-TITLE Create History Title Validation
        Children:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-FILE-CREATE-TIMES Empty History Timestamps
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-AC-CREATE AC: Empty History Creation
        GHOST-MEM-REC-FILE-CREATE
        Create Empty History
        Creating an empty history shall make it active, create an empty .ragmem file, create paired .ragmeta.json content, and create or update the memory_files row with record_count zero.
        REQUIREMENT
        		10.4
        GHOST-MEM-REC-FILE-CREATE-TIMES
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-FILE-CREATE Create Empty History
        GHOST-MEM-REC-FILE-CREATE-TIMES
        Empty History Timestamps
        An explicitly created empty history shall use current UTC for both created_at_utc and updated_at_utc in its initial metadata.
        REQUIREMENT
        		10.5
        GHOST-MEM-REC-FILE-LOAD
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-ROOT Memory Recording and Files Scope
        GHOST-MEM-REC-FILE-LOAD
        File Manager Load
        MemoryFileManager.load_history shall validate file_id and delegate active-history loading to MemoryManager.
        REQUIREMENT
        		10.6
        GHOST-MEM-REC-FILE-RENAME-TITLE
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-ROOT Memory Recording and Files Scope
        Children:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-FILE-RENAME-ID Rename Preserves file_id
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-FILE-RENAME-PAIR Rename Paired Files
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-FILE-RENAME-TIMESTAMP Rename Timestamp Prefix
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-FILE-RENAME-COLLISION Rename Collision Handling
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-FILE-RENAME-SQLITE Rename SQLite Update
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-FILE-RENAME-ACTIVE Rename Active History
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-FILE-RENAME-INACTIVE Rename Inactive History
        GHOST-MEM-REC-FILE-RENAME-TITLE
        Rename Title Validation
        MemoryFileManager.rename_history shall reject an empty file_id or new title and shall reject unknown file_id values.
        REQUIREMENT
        		10.7
        GHOST-MEM-REC-FILE-RENAME-ID
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-FILE-RENAME-TITLE Rename Title Validation
        Children:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-AC-RENAME AC: Stable Rename Identity
        GHOST-MEM-REC-FILE-RENAME-ID
        Rename Preserves file_id
        Renaming a memory history shall preserve file_id.
        REQUIREMENT
        		10.8
        GHOST-MEM-REC-FILE-RENAME-PAIR
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-FILE-RENAME-TITLE Rename Title Validation
        GHOST-MEM-REC-FILE-RENAME-PAIR
        Rename Paired Files
        Renaming shall rename the physical .ragmem and .ragmeta.json files when they exist and update their stored filename fields.
        REQUIREMENT
        		10.9
        GHOST-MEM-REC-FILE-RENAME-TIMESTAMP
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-FILE-RENAME-TITLE Rename Title Validation
        GHOST-MEM-REC-FILE-RENAME-TIMESTAMP
        Rename Timestamp Prefix
        Renaming shall preserve an existing YYYY-MM-DD-HH-MM filename prefix when present; otherwise it shall use the current minute prefix.
        REQUIREMENT
        		10.10
        GHOST-MEM-REC-FILE-RENAME-COLLISION
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-FILE-RENAME-TITLE Rename Title Validation
        GHOST-MEM-REC-FILE-RENAME-COLLISION
        Rename Collision Handling
        When either target filename already exists, rename shall append the first eight characters of file_id to the new stem.
        REQUIREMENT
        		10.11
        GHOST-MEM-REC-FILE-RENAME-SQLITE
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-FILE-RENAME-TITLE Rename Title Validation
        GHOST-MEM-REC-FILE-RENAME-SQLITE
        Rename SQLite Update
        Renaming shall update title, paired filenames, and updated_at_utc in memory_files.
        REQUIREMENT
        		10.12
        GHOST-MEM-REC-FILE-RENAME-ACTIVE
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-FILE-RENAME-TITLE Rename Title Validation
        GHOST-MEM-REC-FILE-RENAME-ACTIVE
        Rename Active History
        When the renamed history is active, MemoryManager file-level state shall be updated and its metadata and SQLite mirror shall be refreshed.
        REQUIREMENT
        		10.13
        GHOST-MEM-REC-FILE-RENAME-INACTIVE
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-FILE-RENAME-TITLE Rename Title Validation
        GHOST-MEM-REC-FILE-RENAME-INACTIVE
        Rename Inactive History
        When the renamed history is not active, the renamed metadata file shall have its file-level title, paired filenames, and updated timestamp updated without loading the history.
        REQUIREMENT
        		10.14
        GHOST-MEM-REC-FILE-DELETE-VALIDATE
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-ROOT Memory Recording and Files Scope
        Children:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-FILE-DELETE-VECTORS Delete History Vectors
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-FILE-DELETE-SQLITE Delete History SQLite Rows
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-FILE-DELETE-PHYSICAL Delete History Physical Files
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-FILE-DELETE-ACTIVE Delete Active History State
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-FILE-DELETE-REPORT Delete History Report
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-UI-DELETE-CONFIRM Typed Delete Confirmation
        GHOST-MEM-REC-FILE-DELETE-VALIDATE
        Delete History Validation
        MemoryFileManager.delete_history shall reject an empty or unknown file_id.
        REQUIREMENT
        		10.15
        GHOST-MEM-REC-FILE-DELETE-VECTORS
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-FILE-DELETE-VALIDATE Delete History Validation
        GHOST-MEM-REC-FILE-DELETE-VECTORS
        Delete History Vectors
        When a compatible MemoryVectorStore is supplied, deleting a history shall request deletion of vectors by file_id before deleting SQLite rows and files.
        REQUIREMENT
        		10.16
        GHOST-MEM-REC-FILE-DELETE-SQLITE
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-FILE-DELETE-VALIDATE Delete History Validation
        GHOST-MEM-REC-FILE-DELETE-SQLITE
        Delete History SQLite Rows
        Deleting a history shall remove matching rows from memory_records and memory_files.
        REQUIREMENT
        		10.17
        GHOST-MEM-REC-FILE-DELETE-PHYSICAL
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-FILE-DELETE-VALIDATE Delete History Validation
        Children:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-AC-DELETE AC: Complete History Delete
        GHOST-MEM-REC-FILE-DELETE-PHYSICAL
        Delete History Physical Files
        Deleting a history shall unlink its .ragmem and .ragmeta.json files when present.
        REQUIREMENT
        		10.18
        GHOST-MEM-REC-FILE-DELETE-ACTIVE
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-FILE-DELETE-VALIDATE Delete History Validation
        GHOST-MEM-REC-FILE-DELETE-ACTIVE
        Delete Active History State
        When the deleted history is active, the current implementation shall replace file_id, clear title and filenames, clear records and metainfo, and mark b_file_created false.
        REQUIREMENT
        		10.19
        GHOST-MEM-REC-FILE-DELETE-REPORT
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-FILE-DELETE-VALIDATE Delete History Validation
        GHOST-MEM-REC-FILE-DELETE-REPORT
        Delete History Report
        The delete result shall report file identity, prior filenames, title, and number of vectors deleted when available.
        REQUIREMENT
        		10.20
        GHOST-MEM-REC-UI-DELETE-CONFIRM
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-FILE-DELETE-VALIDATE Delete History Validation
        GHOST-MEM-REC-UI-DELETE-CONFIRM
        Typed Delete Confirmation
        The current Streamlit file action shall require the exact trimmed text delete before confirming history deletion.
        SECTION
        		11
        11. ChatGPT Shared-Link Import
        TEXT
        The current importer reads one public ChatGPT shared conversation and converts it into an ordinary memory history.
        REQUIREMENT
        		11.1
        GHOST-MEM-REC-IMPORT-URL
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-ROOT Memory Recording and Files Scope
        GHOST-MEM-REC-IMPORT-URL
        Shared URL Validation
        The current importer shall accept only a non-empty URL matching https://chatgpt.com/share/<conversation-id> with the supported identifier characters and optional query string.
        REQUIREMENT
        		11.2
        GHOST-MEM-REC-IMPORT-TITLE
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-ROOT Memory Recording and Files Scope
        GHOST-MEM-REC-IMPORT-TITLE
        Import Title Validation
        The current importer shall require a non-empty title.
        REQUIREMENT
        		11.3
        GHOST-MEM-REC-IMPORT-PLAYWRIGHT
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-ROOT Memory Recording and Files Scope
        GHOST-MEM-REC-IMPORT-PLAYWRIGHT
        Playwright Dependency
        Current shared-page extraction shall use Playwright Chromium and shall report an explicit dependency error when Playwright is unavailable.
        REQUIREMENT
        		11.4
        GHOST-MEM-REC-IMPORT-NAVIGATION
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-ROOT Memory Recording and Files Scope
        GHOST-MEM-REC-IMPORT-NAVIGATION
        Shared Page Navigation
        The importer shall navigate with domcontentloaded, bounded timeout, and current retry handling for specified transient network errors.
        REQUIREMENT
        		11.5
        GHOST-MEM-REC-IMPORT-EXTRACTION-ORDER
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-ROOT Memory Recording and Files Scope
        GHOST-MEM-REC-IMPORT-EXTRACTION-ORDER
        Message Extraction Sources
        The importer shall attempt visible DOM message extraction and embedded structured-message extraction and shall retain body text as fallback input.
        REQUIREMENT
        		11.6
        GHOST-MEM-REC-IMPORT-STABILITY
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-ROOT Memory Recording and Files Scope
        GHOST-MEM-REC-IMPORT-STABILITY
        Message Stability Wait
        When enabled, current extraction shall scroll and wait for visible message count stability before selecting the message source.
        REQUIREMENT
        		11.7
        GHOST-MEM-REC-IMPORT-ROLES
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-ROOT Memory Recording and Files Scope
        GHOST-MEM-REC-IMPORT-ROLES
        Supported Imported Roles
        Only user and assistant messages shall participate in Q/A pair creation.
        REQUIREMENT
        		11.8
        GHOST-MEM-REC-IMPORT-PAIRING
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-ROOT Memory Recording and Files Scope
        GHOST-MEM-REC-IMPORT-PAIRING
        Imported Message Pairing
        Ordered user content followed by assistant content shall be combined into one input/output pair; a later user message shall flush the completed prior pair.
        REQUIREMENT
        		11.9
        GHOST-MEM-REC-IMPORT-RAW-FALLBACK
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-ROOT Memory Recording and Files Scope
        Children:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-AC-IMPORT-FALLBACK AC: Import Body Fallback
        GHOST-MEM-REC-IMPORT-RAW-FALLBACK
        Raw Text Pair Fallback
        When no structured Q/A pair is produced but cleaned body text exists, the importer shall create one pair whose input identifies the imported conversation and whose output is the body text.
        REQUIREMENT
        		11.10
        GHOST-MEM-REC-IMPORT-NO-CONTENT
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-ROOT Memory Recording and Files Scope
        GHOST-MEM-REC-IMPORT-NO-CONTENT
        No Importable Content
        When neither pairs nor usable fallback text exist, the import shall fail explicitly.
        REQUIREMENT
        		11.11
        GHOST-MEM-REC-IMPORT-RECORDS
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-ROOT Memory Recording and Files Scope
        Children:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-IMPORT-PARENT-CHAIN Imported Parent Chain
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-IMPORT-PROJECT-SNAPSHOT Imported Project Snapshot
        GHOST-MEM-REC-IMPORT-RECORDS
        Imported MemoryRecord Construction
        Each imported pair shall become a normal MemoryRecord with source prefixed chatgpt_shared_link:, tag Green, retrieval source mode QA, empty Direct Recall Key, and user keyword chatgpt_shared_link.
        REQUIREMENT
        		11.12
        GHOST-MEM-REC-IMPORT-PARENT-CHAIN
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-IMPORT-RECORDS Imported MemoryRecord Construction
        GHOST-MEM-REC-IMPORT-PARENT-CHAIN
        Imported Parent Chain
        Imported records shall set each record parent_id to the immediately preceding imported record_id, with the first parent_id empty.
        REQUIREMENT
        		11.13
        GHOST-MEM-REC-IMPORT-PROJECT-SNAPSHOT
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-IMPORT-RECORDS Imported MemoryRecord Construction
        GHOST-MEM-REC-IMPORT-PROJECT-SNAPSHOT
        Imported Project Snapshot
        The importer shall apply the supplied active project name and embedded-file snapshot to each imported record.
        REQUIREMENT
        		11.14
        GHOST-MEM-REC-IMPORT-BRIEF
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-ROOT Memory Recording and Files Scope
        GHOST-MEM-REC-IMPORT-BRIEF
        Optional Shared Memory Brief
        When a non-empty import memory_brief is supplied, the importer shall assign that brief and its title to every imported record and shall use all imported record IDs as contributor IDs.
        REQUIREMENT
        		11.15
        GHOST-MEM-REC-IMPORT-PERSIST
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-ROOT Memory Recording and Files Scope
        Children:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-IMPORT-PENDING-RESET Imported Pending Buffer Reset
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-IMPORT-INGEST Optional Imported Vector Ingestion
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-AC-IMPORT AC: Shared Conversation Import
        GHOST-MEM-REC-IMPORT-PERSIST
        Imported History Persistence
        Imported records shall be persisted as a new ordinary memory history by writing all record blocks to a new .ragmem file, saving metadata, and refreshing SQLite.
        REQUIREMENT
        		11.16
        GHOST-MEM-REC-IMPORT-PENDING-RESET
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-IMPORT-PERSIST Imported History Persistence
        GHOST-MEM-REC-IMPORT-PENDING-RESET
        Imported Pending Buffer Reset
        Persisting an imported history shall reset pending_activebrief_topic_buffer to empty.
        REQUIREMENT
        		11.17
        GHOST-MEM-REC-IMPORT-INGEST
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-IMPORT-PERSIST Imported History Persistence
        GHOST-MEM-REC-IMPORT-INGEST
        Optional Imported Vector Ingestion
        When MemoryIngestionManager is available, the importer shall call ingest_all after durable history persistence.
        REQUIREMENT
        		11.18
        GHOST-MEM-REC-IMPORT-REPORT
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-ROOT Memory Recording and Files Scope
        GHOST-MEM-REC-IMPORT-REPORT
        Import Result Report
        A successful import shall report URL, title, file identity, paired filenames, record/pair/message counts, raw text character count, extraction method, brief assignment status, and optional vector-ingestion result.
        SECTION
        		12
        12. Streamlit Session and Action Wiring
        TEXT
        Streamlit session state instantiates memory services once per session and delegates actions to server-side components.
        REQUIREMENT
        		12.1
        GHOST-MEM-REC-SESSION-MANAGER
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-ROOT Memory Recording and Files Scope
        GHOST-MEM-REC-SESSION-MANAGER
        Session MemoryManager Initialization
        Current Streamlit startup shall create one MemoryManager in session state with data/memory as memory_root and memory_index.sqlite3 as sqlite_path.
        REQUIREMENT
        		12.2
        GHOST-MEM-REC-SESSION-CHUNKER
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-ROOT Memory Recording and Files Scope
        GHOST-MEM-REC-SESSION-CHUNKER
        Session MemoryChunker Initialization
        Current Streamlit startup shall create one MemoryChunker in session state when absent.
        REQUIREMENT
        		12.3
        GHOST-MEM-REC-SESSION-STORE
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-ROOT Memory Recording and Files Scope
        GHOST-MEM-REC-SESSION-STORE
        Session MemoryVectorStore Initialization
        Current Streamlit startup shall create one MemoryVectorStore in session state under data/memory/vector_db with collection memory_vectors.
        REQUIREMENT
        		12.4
        GHOST-MEM-REC-SESSION-INGEST
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-ROOT Memory Recording and Files Scope
        GHOST-MEM-REC-SESSION-INGEST
        Session MemoryIngestionManager Initialization
        Current Streamlit startup shall construct MemoryIngestionManager from the session MemoryManager, MemoryChunker, and MemoryVectorStore.
        REQUIREMENT
        		12.5
        GHOST-MEM-REC-MANUAL-FEED
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-ROOT Memory Recording and Files Scope
        GHOST-MEM-REC-MANUAL-FEED
        Manual Memory Feed
        The current manual memory-feed action shall read prompt_text and manual_memory_feed_text, reject either empty value, capture active project/file snapshot, collect editable record metadata, and call capture_memory_pair with source manual_memory_feed.
        REQUIREMENT
        		12.6
        GHOST-MEM-REC-FILES-ACTIONS
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-ROOT Memory Recording and Files Scope
        GHOST-MEM-REC-FILES-ACTIONS
        Files Page Actions
        The current files action layer shall delegate create, load, rename, delete, and import operations to MemoryFileManager or the ChatGPT importer rather than implement persistence directly.
        REQUIREMENT
        		12.7
        GHOST-MEM-REC-WIDGET-CLEAR
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-ROOT Memory Recording and Files Scope
        GHOST-MEM-REC-WIDGET-CLEAR
        Memory Widget State Reset
        After file create, load, delete, or import, the current UI shall clear per-record tag, retrieval-mode, user-keyword, and Direct Recall widget state keys.
        REQUIREMENT
        		12.8
        GHOST-MEM-REC-ACTIVE-PROJECT-SNAPSHOT
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-ROOT Memory Recording and Files Scope
        Children:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-UI-NO-PROJECT No Active Project Snapshot
        GHOST-MEM-REC-ACTIVE-PROJECT-SNAPSHOT
        UI Active Project Snapshot
        When an active project exists, the current UI shall attempt to capture the project name and controller-reported embedded file list for new or imported records.
        REQUIREMENT
        		12.9
        GHOST-MEM-REC-UI-NO-PROJECT
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-ACTIVE-PROJECT-SNAPSHOT UI Active Project Snapshot
        GHOST-MEM-REC-UI-NO-PROJECT
        No Active Project Snapshot
        When no active project exists, current capture/import wiring shall use no project name and an empty embedded-file snapshot.
        SECTION
        		13
        13. Error Handling, Security, and Quality
        TEXT
        Recording errors must remain visible without converting derivative failures into loss of durable truth.
        REQUIREMENT
        		13.1
        GHOST-MEM-REC-NO-EMPTY-PAIR
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-ROOT Memory Recording and Files Scope
        Children:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-AC-EMPTY AC: Empty Pair Rejection
        GHOST-MEM-REC-NO-EMPTY-PAIR
        No Empty Memory Pair
        The recording action shall not create a MemoryRecord from an empty prompt or empty response.
        REQUIREMENT
        		13.2
        GHOST-MEM-REC-FILE-ID-VALIDATION
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-ROOT Memory Recording and Files Scope
        GHOST-MEM-REC-FILE-ID-VALIDATION
        File Identifier Validation
        File-level operations shall reject empty file_id values rather than execute broad file or database operations.
        REQUIREMENT
        		13.3
        GHOST-MEM-REC-PATH-SANITATION
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-ROOT Memory Recording and Files Scope
        GHOST-MEM-REC-PATH-SANITATION
        Filename Path Sanitization
        User-provided history titles shall not be used directly as path fragments; the current safe-title transformation shall be applied.
        REQUIREMENT
        		13.4
        GHOST-MEM-REC-SOURCE-PRESERVATION
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-ROOT Memory Recording and Files Scope
        GHOST-MEM-REC-SOURCE-PRESERVATION
        Source Preservation
        Memory recording and import shall preserve source metadata sufficient to distinguish manual capture from imported shared conversations.
        REQUIREMENT
        		13.5
        GHOST-MEM-REC-HASH-INTEGRITY
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-ROOT Memory Recording and Files Scope
        GHOST-MEM-REC-HASH-INTEGRITY
        Body Hash Integrity
        New MemoryRecords shall compute input/output hashes from exact stored text and shall preserve loaded persisted hashes when present.
        REQUIREMENT
        		13.6
        GHOST-MEM-REC-NO-SECRET
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-ROOT Memory Recording and Files Scope
        GHOST-MEM-REC-NO-SECRET
        No Secret Persistence
        Memory body and metadata persistence shall not intentionally store provider API keys or browser credentials.
        REQUIREMENT
        		13.7
        GHOST-MEM-REC-PUBLIC-LOG
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-ROOT Memory Recording and Files Scope
        GHOST-MEM-REC-PUBLIC-LOG
        Public Recording Logs
        Public recording logs shall use concise file or record identifiers and status messages and shall not emit full MemoryRecord bodies by default.
        REQUIREMENT
        		13.8
        GHOST-MEM-REC-CONFIDENTIAL-LOG
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-ROOT Memory Recording and Files Scope
        GHOST-MEM-REC-CONFIDENTIAL-LOG
        Confidential Developer Logs
        Complete memory payloads or detailed importer diagnostics shall remain behind explicitly enabled confidential developer logging.
        REQUIREMENT
        		13.9
        GHOST-MEM-REC-FILE-DELETE-ORDER
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-ROOT Memory Recording and Files Scope
        GHOST-MEM-REC-FILE-DELETE-ORDER
        Delete Ordering
        Current history deletion shall attempt vector cleanup, then delete SQLite rows, then unlink physical files, preserving the actual execution order for diagnostics.
        REQUIREMENT
        		13.10
        GHOST-MEM-REC-NO-VECTOR-TRUTH
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-ROOT Memory Recording and Files Scope
        GHOST-MEM-REC-NO-VECTOR-TRUTH
        No Vector Authority
        Successful or failed vector ingestion shall not change which stable input/output body is authoritative.
        REQUIREMENT
        		13.11
        GHOST-MEM-REC-TESTABILITY
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-ROOT Memory Recording and Files Scope
        GHOST-MEM-REC-TESTABILITY
        Recording Testability
        MemoryRecord serialization, title sanitation, metadata rebuild, SQLite mirroring, load overlay, and file operations shall be testable without provider LLM calls.
        SECTION
        		14
        14. Traceability and Acceptance Criteria
        TEXT
        These criteria verify the current durable recording and file-management contracts.
        REQUIREMENT
        		14.1
        GHOST-MEM-REC-CODE-OWNERSHIP
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-ROOT Memory Recording and Files Scope
        Children:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-AC-SYNC AC: Requirement-Code Synchronization
        GHOST-MEM-REC-CODE-OWNERSHIP
        Recording Code Ownership
        MemoryRecord, MemoryManager, memory actions, file manager, import helpers, and file UI actions shall map to the deepest applicable UIDs in this document.
        REQUIREMENT
        		14.2
        GHOST-MEM-REC-SIBLING-BOUNDARY
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-ROOT Memory Recording and Files Scope
        GHOST-MEM-REC-SIBLING-BOUNDARY
        Sibling Ownership Boundary
        Memory vector ingestion and retrieval shall remain owned by 52; ActiveBrief algorithms, runtime compression, and synthesis shall remain owned by 53.
        REQUIREMENT
        		14.3
        GHOST-MEM-REC-AC-CAPTURE
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-CAPTURE-PERSIST-SEQUENCE Capture Persistence Sequence
        GHOST-MEM-REC-AC-CAPTURE
        AC: Durable Pair Capture
        Given non-empty input and output, capture shall produce one MemoryRecord, append one stable .ragmem block, update .ragmeta.json, and mirror the record in SQLite.
        REQUIREMENT
        		14.4
        GHOST-MEM-REC-AC-EMPTY
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-NO-EMPTY-PAIR No Empty Memory Pair
        GHOST-MEM-REC-AC-EMPTY
        AC: Empty Pair Rejection
        Given empty input or output after trimming, no record, file append, metadata rewrite, SQLite row, or vector-ingestion schedule shall be produced.
        REQUIREMENT
        		14.5
        GHOST-MEM-REC-AC-AUTHORITY
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-META-NO-STABLE-OVERWRITE Stable Field Overlay Protection
        GHOST-MEM-REC-AC-AUTHORITY
        AC: Body and Metadata Authority
        Editing a tag shall change .ragmeta.json and SQLite metadata while leaving the corresponding .ragmem stable body unchanged.
        REQUIREMENT
        		14.6
        GHOST-MEM-REC-AC-LOAD
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-LOAD-REFRESH SQLite Refresh after Load
        GHOST-MEM-REC-AC-LOAD
        AC: History Load
        Given a valid indexed history, loading shall restore record order and stable bodies, overlay current metadata, reset pending-topic state, and refresh SQLite.
        REQUIREMENT
        		14.7
        GHOST-MEM-REC-AC-CREATE
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-FILE-CREATE Create Empty History
        GHOST-MEM-REC-AC-CREATE
        AC: Empty History Creation
        Creating a named empty history shall produce paired empty/body metadata files and a file-level SQLite row with zero records.
        REQUIREMENT
        		14.8
        GHOST-MEM-REC-AC-RENAME
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-FILE-RENAME-ID Rename Preserves file_id
        GHOST-MEM-REC-AC-RENAME
        AC: Stable Rename Identity
        Renaming a history shall preserve file_id while updating paired filenames, title, metadata file fields, and the SQLite file row.
        REQUIREMENT
        		14.9
        GHOST-MEM-REC-AC-DELETE
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-FILE-DELETE-PHYSICAL Delete History Physical Files
        GHOST-MEM-REC-AC-DELETE
        AC: Complete History Delete
        Deleting a selected history shall remove its SQLite rows, physical paired files, and memory vectors when the vector store is connected.
        REQUIREMENT
        		14.10
        GHOST-MEM-REC-AC-IMPORT
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-IMPORT-PERSIST Imported History Persistence
        GHOST-MEM-REC-AC-IMPORT
        AC: Shared Conversation Import
        Given a valid public shared conversation with importable user/assistant content, import shall create a new ordinary memory history whose Q/A pairs are normal MemoryRecords and may be vector-ingested after persistence.
        REQUIREMENT
        		14.11
        GHOST-MEM-REC-AC-IMPORT-FALLBACK
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-IMPORT-RAW-FALLBACK Raw Text Pair Fallback
        GHOST-MEM-REC-AC-IMPORT-FALLBACK
        AC: Import Body Fallback
        Given no structured Q/A pairs but usable body text, import shall create exactly one fallback pair rather than silently report a structured extraction success.
        REQUIREMENT
        		14.12
        GHOST-MEM-REC-AC-VECTOR-FAIL
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-INGEST-SCHEDULE-FAIL Ingestion Scheduling Failure
        GHOST-MEM-REC-AC-VECTOR-FAIL
        AC: Vector Failure Isolation
        If asynchronous vector ingestion cannot be scheduled after capture, the .ragmem body, metadata, and SQLite row shall remain saved.
        REQUIREMENT
        		14.13
        GHOST-MEM-REC-AC-NO-RUNTIME-PERSIST
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-META-NO-RUNTIME Runtime Artifact Exclusion
        GHOST-MEM-REC-AC-NO-RUNTIME-PERSIST
        AC: Runtime Artifact Exclusion
        MemoryContextPack, query-dependent compression, and synthesized Memory Context shall not appear in newly written .ragmem or .ragmeta.json data.
        REQUIREMENT
        		14.14
        GHOST-MEM-REC-AC-SYNC
        Draft
        Parents:
        • GHOST-MEM-REC-CODE-OWNERSHIP Recording Code Ownership
        GHOST-MEM-REC-AC-SYNC
        AC: Requirement-Code Synchronization
        A recording baseline shall not be accepted when stable-body fields, metadata authority, file identity, capture order, SQLite mirror semantics, or history operations contradict this document.
        Built with StrictDoc 0.25.0
